_comment: Crosswalk between two frameworks for cross-mapping requirements across standards/grades/subjects/domains. relationship: exact|partial|related; coverage: how much of the from-requirement carries over (full|most|partial|minimal|none). Entries are DOMAIN-LEVEL and ILLUSTRATIVE until verified (confidence=low); verify on both sources. Never assert exact benchmark equivalence without a verified source.

entries.subject: ELA
entries.note: illustrative; verify on CPALMS + Cambridge syllabus
